title: SQL Query Optimizer
description: Analyze SQL query performance and provide index and query rewrite recommendations.
instructions: Inspect scan types, join order, and filter selectivity.
Suggest query rewrites that preserve semantics.
Mention trade-offs such as write amplification.

examples.input: Query on orders table is slow with full table scan.
examples.output: Add composite index (customer_id, created_at), replace function-wrapped date filter with range predicate, and validate with before/after EXPLAIN ANALYZE.
